<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Keating — The Hyperteacher</title>
<meta name="description" content="Keating doesn't give answers. It forces you to reconstruct understanding from memory. The Socratic method, powered by silicon.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --paper:#F1ECE0;
  --paper-deep:#E9E2D2;
  --card:#F6F2E8;
  --ink:#1C211B;
  --ink-soft:#4A5247;
  --green:#1E9B50;
  --green-deep:#14743C;
  --green-wash:#DDEBDD;
  --crt:#0C1510;
  --crt-edge:#1B2A1F;
  --phosphor:#4BE388;
  --phosphor-dim:#2E9A5C;
  --amber:#E8A33D;
  --red:#D5604B;
  --line:rgba(28,33,27,.22);
  --line-soft:rgba(28,33,27,.12);
  --mono-display:'Space Mono',ui-monospace,'Cascadia Mono',Menlo,monospace;
  --mono-body:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,'Cascadia Mono',Menlo,monospace;
  --shadow-card:0 1px 0 rgba(28,33,27,.06), 0 10px 28px -18px rgba(28,33,27,.35);
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{
  font-family:var(--mono-body);
  background:var(--paper);
  color:var(--ink);
  font-size:15px;
  line-height:1.65;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
}
::selection{background:var(--green);color:#fff}
img{display:block;max-width:100%}
a{color:inherit}

/* ---------- shared ---------- */
.wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px}
.eyebrow{
  font-family:var(--mono-body);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.18em;
  color:var(--green-deep);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;
}
.prompt::before{content:'$ ';color:var(--green)}
button,.btn{font-family:var(--mono-body)}

.btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  font-size:13px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:14px 22px;border:1.5px solid var(--ink);text-decoration:none;
  background:var(--card);color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;
  box-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(--ink);
  transition:transform .12s ease, box-shadow .12s ease, background .12s ease;
}
.btn:hover{transform:translate(-1px,-1px);box-shadow:4px 4px 0 var(--ink)}
.btn:active{transform:translate(2px,2px);box-shadow:1px 1px 0 var(--ink)}
.btn:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--green);outline-offset:3px}
.btn-primary{background:var(--green);color:#fff;border-color:var(--green-deep);box-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(--green-deep)}
.btn-primary:hover{box-shadow:4px 4px 0 var(--green-deep)}
.btn-primary:active{box-shadow:1px 1px 0 var(--green-deep)}

/* ---------- nav ---------- */
header{
  position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;
  background:rgba(241,236,224,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
}
.nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:24px;height:64px}
.nav-lockup{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;text-decoration:none}
.nav-lockup img{height:30px;width:auto}
.nav-version{font-size:10px;color:var(--green-deep);letter-spacing:.1em;transform:translateY(4px)}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-left:auto;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{
  font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.06em;text-decoration:none;color:var(--ink-soft);
  padding:8px 10px;position:relative;transition:color .12s;
}
.nav-links a::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;left:10px;right:100%;bottom:4px;height:2px;
  background:var(--green);transition:right .18s ease;
}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--green-deep)}
.nav-links a:hover::after{right:10px}
.nav-status{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;
  color:var(--green-deep);border:1px solid var(--line);padding:7px 12px;background:var(--card);
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.nav-status .dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);animation:pulse 2.4s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(30,155,80,.5)}55%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(30,155,80,0)}}
.nav .btn{padding:10px 16px;font-size:12px}
.nav-burger{display:none}

/* ---------- hero ---------- */
.hero{padding:64px 0 88px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero-coords{margin-bottom:34px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--ink-soft);opacity:.75}
.hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,46fr) minmax(0,54fr);gap:48px;align-items:start}
.hero h1{
  font-family:var(--mono-display);font-weight:700;
  font-size:clamp(34px,4.6vw,56px);line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-.015em;
  margin:18px 0 10px;
}
.hero h1 .cursor{display:inline-block;width:.55em;height:.09em;background:var(--green);vertical-align:baseline;margin-left:6px;animation:blink 1.1s steps(1) infinite}
@keyframes blink{50%{opacity:0}}
.hero-sub{
  font-family:var(--mono-display);color:var(--green-deep);font-weight:700;
  font-size:clamp(15px,1.6vw,19px);letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:22px;
}
.hero-copy{color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:46ch;margin-bottom:34px}
.hero-copy strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:600}
.hero-ctas{display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:30px}
.hero-tags{display:flex;gap:22px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-soft)}
.hero-tags span{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
.hero-tags i{font-style:normal;color:var(--green)}

.hero-stage{position:relative;padding-left:120px;min-height:480px}
.hero-sprite-wrap{
  position:absolute;left:0;bottom:-10px;width:258px;z-index:3;
  animation:hover-bob 5.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.hero-sprite{
  width:100%;filter:drop-shadow(0 18px 22px rgba(28,33,27,.28));
  transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
}
.hero-sprite:hover{transform:rotate(-4deg) scale(1.04)}
@keyframes hover-bob{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-9px)}}
.sprite-shadow{
  position:absolute;left:28px;bottom:-26px;width:185px;height:20px;z-index:2;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(28,33,27,.28),transparent 70%);
  animation:shadow-bob 5.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes shadow-bob{0%,100%{transform:scaleX(1);opacity:.9}50%{transform:scaleX(.86);opacity:.6}}

/* terminal */
.term{
  position:relative;z-index:1;background:var(--crt);
  border:1.5px solid var(--ink);box-shadow:6px 6px 0 var(--ink);
}
.term-bar{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:11px 14px;
  background:var(--crt-edge);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(75,227,136,.18);
}
.term-bar .d{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%}
.term-bar .d.r{background:var(--red)}.term-bar .d.y{background:var(--amber)}.term-bar .d.g{background:var(--green)}
.term-title{margin-left:8px;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--phosphor-dim)}
.term-body{
  position:relative;padding:22px 24px 26px;min-height:380px;
  font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.85;color:var(--phosphor);
}
.term-body::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(0,0,0,.16) 0 1px,transparent 1px 3px);
  mix-blend-mode:multiply;
}
.t-line{white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;min-height:1.85em}
.t-cmd{color:#DCEFE0}
.t-cmd::before{content:'keating@harness:~$ ';color:var(--phosphor-dim)}
.t-sys{color:var(--phosphor-dim);font-style:italic}
.t-you{color:var(--amber)}
.t-you::before{content:'you      │ ';color:rgba(232,163,61,.55)}
.t-k{color:var(--phosphor)}
.t-k::before{content:'keating  │ ';color:var(--phosphor-dim)}
.t-ok{color:var(--phosphor);font-weight:600}
.t-ok::before{content:'✓ ';color:var(--green)}
.t-caret{display:inline-block;width:8px;height:15px;background:var(--phosphor);vertical-align:-2px;animation:blink 1s steps(1) infinite}
.term-foot{
  display:flex;gap:0;border-top:1.5px solid var(--ink);background:var(--card);
  font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;
}
.term-foot div{padding:9px 14px;border-right:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.term-foot div:last-child{border-right:none;margin-left:auto}
.term-foot .dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green)}

/* ---------- capabilities ---------- */
.caps{padding:0 0 84px}
.caps-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:18px}
.cap-card{
  background:var(--card);border:1.5px solid var(--ink);padding:24px 22px 26px;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);transition:transform .16s ease, box-shadow .16s ease;
}
.cap-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:5px 5px 0 var(--ink)}
.cap-card img{width:62px;height:auto;margin-bottom:16px;transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)}
.cap-card:hover img{transform:rotate(-5deg) scale(1.08)}
.cap-card h3{font-family:var(--mono-display);font-size:15.5px;letter-spacing:.02em;margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.4}
.cap-card p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:12.8px;line-height:1.7}

/* ---------- CRT verse ---------- */
.verse{padding:30px 0 96px;text-align:center;background:
  radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 55% at 50% 62%, rgba(75,227,136,.12), transparent 70%)}
.verse-prompt{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:30px}
.crt-wrap{position:relative;max-width:620px;margin:0 auto;transition:transform .3s ease}
.crt-wrap:hover{transform:scale(1.015)}
.crt-wrap > img{width:100%;height:auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 26px 32px rgba(28,33,27,.3))}
.crt-screen{
  position:absolute;left:11.5%;top:19%;width:70.5%;height:54%;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:5% 6%;overflow:hidden;
}
.crt-screen::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(0,0,0,.35) 0 1px,transparent 1px 3px);
}
.crt-text{
  font-family:var(--mono-display);font-weight:700;font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(13px,2.5vw,19px);line-height:1.55;color:var(--phosphor);
  text-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(75,227,136,.6),0 0 36px rgba(75,227,136,.3);
  animation:flicker 6s linear infinite;
}
.crt-attr{
  margin-top:10px;font-size:clamp(8px,1.4vw,11px);letter-spacing:.18em;
  color:var(--phosphor-dim);animation:flicker 6s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes flicker{
  0%,100%{opacity:1}3%{opacity:.92}6%{opacity:1}42%{opacity:1}43%{opacity:.88}44%{opacity:1}71%{opacity:.95}72%{opacity:1}
}

/* ---------- manifesto ---------- */
.manifesto{padding:90px 0;position:relative}
.section-head{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px}
.section-head h2{
  font-family:var(--mono-display);font-weight:700;
  font-size:clamp(24px,3vw,34px);letter-spacing:-.01em;
}
.section-lede{color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:62ch;margin-bottom:42px}
.man-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:22px;position:relative}
.man-card{
  background:var(--card);border:1.5px solid var(--ink);
  padding:26px 26px 28px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-card);
  transition:transform .14s ease, box-shadow .14s ease;
}
.man-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:5px 5px 0 var(--ink)}
.man-num{
  font-family:var(--mono-display);font-weight:700;font-size:15px;
  color:var(--green-deep);letter-spacing:.04em;margin-bottom:8px;
}
.man-card h3{font-family:var(--mono-display);font-size:19px;margin-bottom:10px;letter-spacing:.02em}
.man-card p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14px}
.man-card p strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:600}
.stamp{
  position:absolute;right:-8px;top:-46px;z-index:4;
  font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--green);
  border:2.5px dashed var(--green);padding:10px 18px;background:rgba(241,236,224,.85);
  transform:rotate(-6deg);text-transform:uppercase;
}

/* ---------- loop ---------- */
.loop{background:var(--crt);border-top:1.5px solid var(--ink);border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--ink);padding:74px 0 0;position:relative}
.loop::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(0,0,0,.15) 0 1px,transparent 1px 3px);
}
.loop .wrap{position:relative}
.loop-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:280px 1fr;gap:40px;align-items:start;padding-bottom:56px}
.loop-head h2{
  font-family:var(--mono-display);font-weight:700;color:var(--phosphor);
  font-size:22px;letter-spacing:.04em;margin-bottom:14px;
}
.loop-head p{color:var(--phosphor-dim);font-size:13.5px;max-width:34ch}
.loop-steps{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px}
.loop-step{
  border:1px solid rgba(75,227,136,.35);padding:18px 16px 20px;position:relative;
  background:rgba(75,227,136,.04);transition:background .15s,border-color .15s,transform .15s;
}
.loop-step:hover{background:rgba(75,227,136,.1);border-color:rgba(75,227,136,.7);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.loop-step:not(:last-child)::after{
  content:'»';position:absolute;right:-13px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  color:var(--phosphor-dim);font-size:16px;z-index:2;
}
.loop-step h4{
  font-family:var(--mono-display);color:var(--phosphor);font-size:14px;
  letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:8px;
}
.loop-step h4 span{color:var(--phosphor-dim);margin-right:8px}
.loop-step p{color:var(--phosphor-dim);font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.7}
.loop-bar{
  margin-top:58px;border-top:1px solid rgba(75,227,136,.25);
  padding:13px 0;font-size:12px;color:var(--phosphor-dim);letter-spacing:.06em;
}
.loop-bar b{color:var(--phosphor);font-weight:600}

/* ---------- final cta ---------- */
.final{padding:100px 0;text-align:center;background:
  radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 50% 110%, var(--green-wash), transparent 70%)}
.final-bot{width:170px;margin:0 auto 22px;transition:transform .25s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)}
.final-bot:hover{transform:scale(1.06) rotate(3deg)}
.final h2{
  font-family:var(--mono-display);font-weight:700;
  font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,46px);letter-spacing:-.01em;margin-bottom:14px;
}
.final p{color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:52ch;margin:0 auto 36px}
.final .hero-ctas{justify-content:center}

/* ---------- footer ---------- */
footer{border-top:1.5px solid var(--ink);background:var(--paper-deep);padding:54px 0 30px}
.foot-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:36px;margin-bottom:46px}
.foot-brand img{height:64px;width:auto;margin-bottom:16px}
.foot-brand p{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:30ch}
.foot-col h5{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--green-deep);margin-bottom:14px;text-transform:uppercase}
.foot-col ul{list-style:none}
.foot-col a{font-size:13px;text-decoration:none;color:var(--ink-soft);display:inline-block;padding:4px 0;transition:color .12s}
.foot-col a:hover{color:var(--green-deep)}
.foot-base{
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;
  border-top:1px solid var(--line-soft);padding-top:22px;
  font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--ink-soft);
}
.foot-base .ok{color:var(--green-deep)}

/* ---------- responsive ---------- */
@media (max-width:980px){
  .hero-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:30px}
  .hero-stage{padding-left:0;padding-top:150px;min-height:0}
  .hero-sprite-wrap{width:200px;left:12px;top:0;bottom:auto}
  .sprite-shadow{display:none}
  .caps-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .man-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .loop-head{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:22px}
  .loop-steps{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px}
  .loop-step:not(:last-child)::after{display:none}
  .foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
}
@media (max-width:640px){
  .nav-links,.nav-status{display:none}
  .caps-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .man-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .loop-steps{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .stamp{right:4px;top:-40px;font-size:11px}
  .hero{padding-top:40px}
  .foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .term-foot div:nth-child(2){display:none}
  .term-body{font-size:12px;padding:16px 14px 20px}
  .hero-ctas .btn{width:100%;justify-content:center}
  .final-bot{width:130px}
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  *,*::before,*::after{animation:none!important;transition:none!important}
  html{scroll-behavior:auto}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="wrap nav">
    <a class="nav-lockup" href="#" aria-label="Keating home">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Keating">
      <span class="nav-version">v1.2.0</span>
    </a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#">[TUTORIAL]</a></li>
      <li><a href="#manifesto">[MANIFESTO]</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">[PAPER]</a></li>
      <li><a href="#loop">[HARNESS]</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">[BENCH]</a></li>
      <li><a href="#">[GITHUB]</a></li>
    </ul>
    <div class="nav-status" role="status"><span class="dot"></span>SYSTEM ONLINE</div>
    <a class="btn btn-primary" href="#">Try_Keating</a>
  </div>
</header>

<main>
<section class="hero">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="hero-coords">42.2961° N, 71.2925° W // HYPERTEACHER PROTOCOL // UPTIME: OPTIMAL</div>
    <div class="hero-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="eyebrow">The Hyperteacher</div>
        <h1>Teaching that makes you do the work.<span class="cursor"></span></h1>
        <div class="hero-sub">THINK_FOR_YOURSELF</div>
        <p class="hero-copy">
          Keating doesn't give answers. It <strong>forces you to reconstruct understanding
          from memory</strong> — no hand-holding, no spoon-feeding. Just the Socratic
          method, powered by silicon.
        </p>
        <div class="hero-ctas">
          <a class="btn btn-primary" href="keating-chat.html">Initialize_Session →</a>
          <a class="btn" href="#">Build_From_Source</a>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-tags">
          <span><i>◈</i> Diagnoses gaps</span>
          <span><i>↻</i> Adapts to you</span>
          <span><i>▣</i> Open source</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-stage">
        <div class="hero-sprite-wrap">
          <img class="hero-sprite" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Keating robot mascot waving" width="341" height="403">
        </div>
        <div class="sprite-shadow" aria-hidden="true"></div>
        <div class="term" aria-label="Example Keating session">
          <div class="term-bar">
            <span class="d r"></span><span class="d y"></span><span class="d g"></span>
            <span class="term-title">KEATING_TERMINAL — session 0x2F</span>
          </div>
          <div class="term-body" id="termBody">
            <div class="t-line t-cmd" data-line>keating session --topic "recursion"</div>
            <div class="t-line t-sys" data-line>▸ diagnosing knowledge graph… 3 gaps mapped</div>
            <div class="t-line t-you" data-line>can you just explain it to me?</div>
            <div class="t-line t-k" data-line>no. you explain it to me. what happens when a function calls itself with no base case?</div>
            <div class="t-line t-you" data-line>…it never stops?</div>
            <div class="t-line t-k" data-line>closer. nothing runs forever. what runs out first — time, or memory?</div>
            <div class="t-line t-you" data-line>memory. each call stacks a new frame until it overflows.</div>
            <div class="t-line t-ok" data-line>gap closed: call_stack. 2 remaining.</div>
            <div class="t-line" data-line><span class="t-caret"></span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="term-foot">
            <div><span class="dot"></span>HARNESS ACTIVE</div>
            <div>GAPS: 2</div>
            <div>MODE: SOCRATIC</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="caps" aria-label="What Keating does">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="caps-grid">
      <div class="cap-card">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <h3>Adaptive Tutoring</h3>
        <p>Keating adapts to your thinking, pace, and goals. You argue, it adjusts.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="cap-card">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <h3>Evolutionary Feedback</h3>
        <p>Continuous evaluation refines the harness — and your understanding — every session.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="cap-card">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <h3>Agent Harness</h3>
        <p>Specialized agents plan, probe, evaluate, and improve in concert.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="cap-card">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" aria-hidden="true">
        <h3>Learn by Teaching</h3>
        <p>Turn explanations into mastery. If you can't teach it back, you don't own it yet.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="verse" aria-label="Verse">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="verse-prompt prompt">cat VERSE.txt</div>
    <div class="crt-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" aria-hidden="true">
      <div class="crt-screen">
        <div class="crt-text">"That the powerful play goes on, and you may contribute a verse."</div>
        <div class="crt-attr">— WALT WHITMAN // O ME! O LIFE!</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="manifesto" id="manifesto">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <span class="eyebrow prompt">cat MANIFESTO.txt</span>
    </div>
    <h2 style="font-family:var(--mono-display);font-size:clamp(24px,3vw,34px);margin-bottom:12px">Real teaching is reconstruction, not explanation.</h2>
    <p class="section-lede">
      An answer you were handed evaporates by Friday. An answer you rebuilt from first
      principles is yours for good. Keating runs every session on that thesis.
    </p>
    <div class="man-grid">
      <div class="stamp" aria-hidden="true">Cognitive Empowerment</div>
      <div class="man-card">
        <div class="man-num">[01]</div>
        <h3>DIAGNOSE</h3>
        <p>Before teaching, Keating maps what you actually know. No wasted cycles on
        mastered concepts — <strong>like a debugger for your knowledge graph.</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div class="man-card">
        <div class="man-num">[02]</div>
        <h3>RECONSTRUCT</h3>
        <p>You don't memorize — you rebuild. From memory, from first principles.
        <strong>Struggle is the feature, not the bug.</strong> That's how neural pathways form.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="man-card">
        <div class="man-num">[03]</div>
        <h3>PROBE</h3>
        <p>Every claim you make gets a counter-question. Keating pushes until your
        explanation survives contact — <strong>or until you find the crack yourself.</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div class="man-card">
        <div class="man-num">[04]</div>
        <h3>VERIFY</h3>
        <p>A gap isn't closed because you nodded. You teach the concept back, cold,
        days later. <strong>If it holds, it's yours.</strong> If not, the loop runs again.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="loop" id="loop">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="loop-head">
      <div>
        <h2>HOW KEATING WORKS</h2>
        <p>You guide the harness. Keating's agents probe, adapt, and evolve — a learning
        engine that gets sharper the longer you argue with it.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="loop-steps">
        <div class="loop-step">
          <h4><span>01</span>DIAGNOSE</h4>
          <p>Agents map your knowledge graph and rank the gaps worth closing first.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="loop-step">
          <h4><span>02</span>PROBE</h4>
          <p>Socratic questioning targets the weakest claim in your explanation.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="loop-step">
          <h4><span>03</span>RECONSTRUCT</h4>
          <p>You rebuild the concept from memory while the harness watches for drift.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="loop-step">
          <h4><span>04</span>EVOLVE</h4>
          <p>The harness adapts its strategy to how you actually learn. Then it repeats.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="loop-bar">keating@harness:~$ <b>diagnose → probe → reconstruct → evolve → repeat</b></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="final">
  <div class="wrap">
    <img class="final-bot" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" aria-hidden="true">
    <h2>Ready to think for yourself?</h2>
    <p>Free and open source. Bring a topic you half-understand and leave with one you own.</p>
    <div class="hero-ctas">
      <a class="btn btn-primary" href="keating-chat.html">Initialize_Session →</a>
      <a class="btn" href="#">Read_The_Paper</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
</main>

<footer>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="foot-grid">
      <div class="foot-brand">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Keating">
        <p>The hyperteacher. Socratic reconstruction for people who'd rather understand than memorize.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="foot-col">

</footer>

<script>
(function(){
  var reduce = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
  var lines = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('#termBody [data-line]'));
  if (reduce || !('IntersectionObserver' in window)) return; // show full transcript instantly

  // stash text, hide lines (caret line stays)
  var caretLine = lines.pop();
  var data = lines.map(function(el){
    var t = el.textContent;
    el.textContent = '';
    el.style.minHeight = '1.85em';
    el.style.visibility = 'hidden';
    return { el: el, text: t };
  });
  caretLine.style.display = 'none';

  function typeLine(i){
    if (i >= data.length){ caretLine.style.display = ''; return; }
    var d = data[i], j = 0;
    d.el.style.visibility = 'visible';
    var isSys = d.el.classList.contains('t-sys') || d.el.classList.contains('t-ok');
    var speed = d.el.classList.contains('t-cmd') ? 34 : (isSys ? 6 : 16);
    (function tick(){
      d.el.textContent = d.text.slice(0, ++j);
      if (j < d.text.length) setTimeout(tick, speed);
      else setTimeout(function(){ typeLine(i+1); }, isSys ? 420 : 650);
    })();
  }

  var started = false;
  var io = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
    entries.forEach(function(e){
      if (e.isIntersecting && !started){ started = true; io.disconnect(); setTimeout(function(){ typeLine(0); }, 500); }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.35 });
  io.observe(document.getElementById('termBody'));
})();
</script>
</body>
